heading: SERVICES
intro: At Maati Interiors, we believe that a well-designed home should feel as good as it looks. Our work is rooted in natural materials, thoughtful function, and a deep understanding of how environments impact daily life.
subIntro: We take on a limited number of projects to ensure each home is considered, cohesive, and fully realized.

services.title: FULL-SERVICE INTERIOR DESIGN
services.subtitle: Our signature offering
services.description: This is where we do our best work—designing entire homes from concept to completion.
services.note: We manage every detail so your home comes together seamlessly.

services.title: ROOM-BY-ROOM DESIGN
services.subtitle: For focused transformations
services.description: Not every project requires a full-home scope—but it should still feel intentional.
services.note: We approach each space as part of a larger story, ensuring it feels elevated, functional, and aligned with how you live.

services.title: SENSORY-FRIENDLY DESIGN
services.subtitle: Our specialty
services.description: We design spaces that support calm, clarity, and regulation, especially for neurodivergent individuals and families.
details: Material and texture selection for comfort
Layouts that improve flow and ease
services.note: This is not just design, it’s how your home supports your nervous system.

services.title: STYLING & FINISHING
services.subtitle: The final layer that changes everything
services.description: For clients who need help bringing a space together.
services.note: This is where a home shifts from “almost there” to complete.

approach.heading: Our Approach
approach.text: We don’t design for trends. But rather for how you live, move, and feel in your space every day.
approach.goal: Create homes that feel grounded, effortless, and deeply personal.

cta.heading: Start Your Project Today
cta.text: We take on a limited number of clients each season. Submit an inquiry with details about your space, timeline, and goals, and we’ll guide you through next steps.
